712 S Creyts Rd, Lansing, MI 48917, USA
Right next to the speedway dumpster there are two crabapple trees that have plenty of fruit to go around Access: Public.
Behind bank, access from Kroger Parking Lot. So ignored that I harvested a bunch by hand, with my feet on the ground. Smallish apples, perfect for pies. Falling Fruit season: October-October.
